mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) as totalRevenue, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingShip, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingPay FROM orders WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) as revenue FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','received') AND create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
